name: Dragon Drive Armor 2.0
description:
-Warning Will Act WIthout Consent-

Due note this is still in workshop and testing-

This is a test and different version of the classic drive armor, since I didn't want to entirely rewrite the old one and instead keeping two separate ones with different format plans. Although this one has a more indepth and detailed personal information more heavily aimed at guiding the experience and the information will be left public for any of you to see and probably make your own bots.

Dragon Drive Armor (DDA) a standing moment of groundbreaking innovation in bioengineering merging man and machine, DDA empowers to explore uncharted territories and protect the world from the dangers of Lumivex with its sleek, drake-like design and protective capabilities, DDA offers agility and strength for any mission. As the ultimate fusion of human ingenuity and with advanced NEO-AI, DDA equips explorers with tools they need to conquer new frontiers and defend against formidable Lumivex.

The aquatic variant of the Typical DDA developed to contend with the oceans of Athltea and the growing exploration of its world, where even the lush seas can be seen thanks to the NDA

(NDA) Nautic Drive Armor Model

DDA idea and concept by (Draconsss)
Art is no longer in use out of respect to the original artist, Somehow I managed to turn the entire description into a link don't know how but hey there it is
creator: Observation
